title: Insecure API Access Allows Privilege Escalation
description: If the system utilizes APIs, and those APIs aren't properly secured, an attacker could exploit vulnerabilities to gain elevated privileges, potentially gaining full control of the system.
attack_vector: Broken authentication, authorization flaws in API design, lack of input validation, insecure API key management.
mitigations: Implement robust authentication and authorization mechanisms for all API endpoints.
Enforce the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary permissions.
Regularly audit API access logs to detect and prevent unauthorized access.
